text:
Before automation: I spent 45 minutes every morning picking a topic, writing a post, scheduling it. Hit publish. Repeat. Some days I skipped. The algorithm punished inconsistency. Burnout was the price of presence.

After: One Saturday afternoon. Two hours of setup. Free tools. Official Meta API. Now the system reads its own analytics every night and writes better posts by morning. Tokens refresh themselves. I haven’t opened the app since setup day.

The before is grinding. The...
